summary: Frontend testing completed for Customer Filter Drawer reorganization feature. Basic/Advanced filter sections working correctly with z-index fix applied.

ui_bugs.issue: Z-index issue: Filter drawer was behind bottom navigation (z-50 vs z-9999) causing Apply button clicks to navigate to Feedback page instead of applying filters
ui_bugs.status: FIXED - Changed z-index from z-50 to z-[10000]

test_results.filter_drawer_opens: PASS - Filter drawer opens when clicking filter icon button
test_results.basic_section_expanded_by_default: PASS - Basic section shows Tier, Type, City, Inactive, Sort By filters expanded by default
test_results.advanced_section_collapsed_by_default: PASS - Advanced section is collapsed by default (only header visible)
test_results.advanced_section_toggle: PASS - Advanced section can be toggled open, shows Visits, Spent, Diet, Time Slot, Dining, Gender, Source, WhatsApp, VIP Status, Blocked, Blacklist, Complaint, Birthday, Anniversary filters
test_results.filter_selection_works: PASS - Selecting tier filter (Gold/Silver) correctly updates customer count in Apply button
test_results.apply_filters_shows_count: PASS - Apply button shows correct customer count (e.g., 'Show 12 Customers')
test_results.apply_filters_closes_drawer: PASS - Clicking Apply button closes drawer and filters customer list
test_results.clear_all_button: PASS - Clear all button resets all filters to default values
test_results.save_segment_functionality: PASS - Save Segment button appears when filters active, opens dialog with name input

context_for_next_testing_agent: Login via Demo Login button. After login, click 'Skip for Now' to dismiss migration overlay. Navigate to /customers. Filter drawer z-index was fixed from z-50 to z-[10000] to be above bottom nav (z-9999). All filter features in Basic and Advanced sections are working correctly.

fix_applied.change: Changed filter drawer z-index from 'z-50' to 'z-[10000]' to ensure it appears above bottom navigation
fix_applied.reason: Bottom navigation had z-index: 9999 which was causing Apply button clicks to be intercepted by the Feedback nav link
